name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS N
VARIABLES state, turn

(* State variables *)

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ state = [p \in 1..N |-> "idle"]
        /\ turn \in 1..N

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == \/ (* Process p attempts to enter critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "idle"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "trying"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p enters critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "trying"
                            /\ turn = p
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "critical"]
                            /\ turn' = turn
          \/ (* Process p exits critical section *)
          /\ \E p \in 1..N : /\ state[p] = "critical"
                            /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "idle"]
                            /\ turn' = turn

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<state, turn>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ state \in [1..N -> {"idle", "trying", "critical"}]
          /\ turn \in 1..N

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Forks: a function from 1..N to 0..N, where 0 means free, otherwise holds philosopher id *)
(* States: a function from 1..N to {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"} *)

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* Initial state: all forks free, all philosophers thinking *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Action: philosopher i becomes hungry *)
Hungry(i) == /\ states[i] = "thinking"
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
           /\ forks' = forks

(* Action: philosopher i picks up forks if both are free *)
PickUp(i) == /\ states[i] = "hungry"
           /\ forks[i] = 0
           /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = 0
           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = i, ![LEFT(i)] = i]
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]

(* Action: philosopher i puts down forks *)
PutDown(i) == /\ states[i] = "eating"
           /\ forks[i] = i
           /\ forks[LEFT(i)] = i
           /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![i] = 0, ![LEFT(i)] = 0]
           /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Next action: any philosopher can become hungry, pick up forks, or put down forks *)
Next == \E i \in 1..N : (Hungry(i) \/ PickUp(i) \/ PutDown(i))

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : forks[i] = 0 \/ forks[i] = i
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

====

name: Lamport's Bakery Algorithm
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Bakery ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES num, flag



Init == /\ num = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ flag = [i \in 1..N |-> FALSE]

Next == \E i \in 1..N : choose(i)

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<num, flag>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, size

(* The queue is represented as a sequence of length K, with head and tail indices *)
(* head points to the next element to be dequeued; tail points to the next slot to enqueue *)

Init == /\ q = [i \in 1..K |-> 0]
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ size = 0

ProducerAction == /\ size < K
                 /\ q[tail] = 1
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ size' = size + 1
                 /\ head' = head

ConsumerAction == /\ size > 0
                 /\ q[head] = 0
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ size' = size - 1
                 /\ tail' = tail

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, size>>

TypeOK == /\ K \in Nat
         /\ K > 0
         /\ q \in [1..K -> 0..1]
         /\ head \in 1..K
         /\ tail \in 1..K
         /\ size \in 0..K

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Set

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state



(* State variables *)
currentTerm \in Nat
votedFor \in Set(1..N)
state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Initial state *)
Init == 
  /\ currentTerm = 0
  /\ votedFor = {}
  /\ state = "Follower"

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
  \/ state = "Follower" /\ 
    \* Follower actions (e.g., timeout, receive AppendEntries, etc.)
  \/ state = "Candidate" /\ 
    \* Candidate actions (e.g., start election, send RequestVote, etc.)
  \/ state = "Leader" /\ 
    \* Leader actions (e.g., send heartbeats, etc.)

(* Invariant: type correctness *)
TypeOK == 
  /\ currentTerm \in Nat
  /\ votedFor \in Set(1..N)
  /\ state \in {"Follower", "Candidate", "Leader"}

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active, r

Init == /\ readers = <<>> 
      /\ writer_active = 0

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \A r \in readers: r = 0
          /\ writer_active' = 1
      \/ /\ writer_active = 0
          /\ \A r \in readers: r = 0
          /\ \E r \in readers: r' = 1
      \/ /\ writer_active = 1
          /\ \A r \in readers: r = 0
          /\ writer_active' = 0

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values, NULL

VARIABLES store

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

Next == \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]
      \/ /\ \E k \in Keys : /\ store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = NULL]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

TypeOK == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
          /\ \A k \in Keys : store[k] \in Values

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHANNEL_CAPACITY, FiniteSet
VARIABLES channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in Seq
    /\ sentChunks \in FiniteSet
    /\ retransmitCount \in FiniteSet
    /\ channel \in FiniteSet

Init ==
    /\ file = <<>>
    /\ chunks = <<>>
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ channel = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = Append(file, <<>>)
       /\ chunks' = Append(chunks, <<>>)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = Append(chunks, <<>>)
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, <<>>)
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, <<>>)
       /\ channel' = channel
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = Append(channel, <<>>)
    \/ /\ file' = file
       /\ chunks' = chunks
       /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
       /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
       /\ channel' = channel

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, channel>> ==

====
